title: Wynn At Dusk
description: A custom resource pack for Wynncraft.
body:
#
![Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35d1e5dfcbe776625891aae8644134463ab53735_0.webp)
## Wynn At Dusk
This project is a dark recolor/texture of the default Wynncraft resource pack. Designed for players who prefer a sharp and atmospheric aesthetic, this pack preserves some elements from Wynncraft while toning down brightness and enhancing contrast for a moodier in-game experience.

### Features
Recolor and added elements to GUI such as the character info tab and inventory as seen in gallery.

# Requirements
Make sure to place this pack above the default server resource pack after extracting the .zip.  
**[Server IP]:play.wynncraft.com**
